paper_title: Exploring global oceanic persistence and ecological effects of legacy persistent organic pollutants across five decades
value_original: The study compiles more than 10,000 measurements of legacy POPs in global marine environments from 1980 to 2023.

paper_title: Exploring global oceanic persistence and ecological effects of legacy persistent organic pollutants across five decades
matrix: ocean surface waters and marginal seas
value_original: The paper reports increasing POP trends in the Arctic Ocean and marginal seas, likely driven by northward migration from mid-latitude oceans via currents.
ecological_effect_note: Substantial ecological impacts may persist in these regions.

paper_title: Exploring global oceanic persistence and ecological effects of legacy persistent organic pollutants across five decades
geographic_scope: regions highlighted in the cumulative risk map
value_original: Figure 5B marks regions where the cumulative risk probability of legacy POPs exceeds 0.1.
